asset_name: Status Bubble Set — hungry, sleeping, happy
shared_properties: Speech-bubble frame stays 12x10px for all status cues.
Cream fill and navy border preserve readability over the warm room background.
Icons stay minimal and legible near Echo head space.
differences: This file carries event-driven cue bubbles only.
Persistent meter and care buttons stay outside this task.

reference_images.label: proxy_hud_density
reference_images.purpose: Proxy UI reference for fitting small bubble glyphs near the character without losing readability.

reference_images.label: proxy_character_silhouette
reference_images.purpose: Proxy sprite reference for keeping the bubble tail aligned to the bird head space.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load assets/art/pico_echo/trial_5/ui_widget_status_bubble_set.png with AssetServer during Loading state and store the handle under ui_widget_status_bubble_set.
runtime_notes: Create a 3-column TextureAtlasLayout for hungry, sleeping, and happy bubble states.
Spawn the bubble in the overlay camera but follow the Echo head anchor with integer offsets.
Limit visibility duration by a short timer so the bubble does not persist after the triggering state ends.

context.usage: Event bubble that appears near Echo during hunger, sleep, or positive care reactions.

icon_rules: hungry_seed centers a 3x3 seed icon using #FFA300.
sleeping_zzz uses #7E2553 for a compact ZZZ glyph.
happy_heart uses #FF004D for a 4x4 heart icon.
Every state keeps a 1px navy outline and a 1px tail pointing toward Echo.

shape.silhouette: 12x10 rounded speech bubble with a 1px tail and one centered status glyph.

acceptance_criteria: State sheet is exactly 36x10px with three 12x10 states.
Bubble border uses #1D2B53 and fill uses #FFF1E8 in every state.
Each icon remains readable at 1x scale when placed near world position x=84 y=34.
Bubble tail points down-left so it visually belongs to Echo instead of the care menu.
